notes: Applied to every screen/route/view in inventories/screen.json.

steps.title: High-fidelity design spec for {name}
steps.description: Compose {name} from design-system components per 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md; specify layout at 320px/768px/1440px/4K, content hierarchy, and this screen's signature moment.
acceptance_criteria: uses only design-system tokens/components or proposes additions explicitly

steps.title: Implement {name}
steps.description: Build {name} at {path} per its design spec; responsive, deep-linkable, no layout shift on load.
acceptance_criteria: matches design spec at all breakpoints

steps.title: Loading/empty/error/offline behavior for {name}
steps.description: Design-quality loading (skeleton or equivalent), empty (first-run guidance), error (recovery action), and offline behavior for {name}.

steps.title: WCAG 2.2 AA audit of {name}
steps.description: Full-screen audit: landmark structure, heading order, focus order and trap-free dialogs, contrast, keyboard completion of every action on {name}.

steps.title: i18n completeness for {name}
steps.description: All strings keyed, ICU formats for plurals/dates/numbers, pseudo-locale render verified, RTL verified for {name}.

steps.title: Performance budget for {name} on baseline device
steps.description: Measure {name} cold and warm against 07-PERFORMANCE-PLAN.md budgets (TTI, input latency, memory, transfer) on the reference low-tier profile; apply code-splitting/lazy-loading as needed; wire the SOTA enhancement tier behind feature detection.
acceptance_criteria: all budgets met on baseline profile
enhancement tier activates only on capable hardware

steps.title: End-to-end tests for {name} critical paths
steps.description: E2E-cover the happy path and the top failure path through {name}, including navigation in/out and state persistence where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: happy + failure path green in CI

steps.title: Telemetry and funnel events for {name}
steps.description: Instrument {name}: real errors with area/severity/context, plus the screen's key interaction events; no silent catches.
acceptance_criteria: key events observable in dev tooling

steps.title: Document {name} flows
steps.description: Document {name}: purpose, entry points, states, and known limitations.
